_comment: Demo add-on that triggers every deterministic violation check at once, except missing-library / minified-code / obfuscated-code (need a bundled, minified or obfuscated file), api-coverage (needs a parse/resolution gap), strict-max-version-api (needs an Experiment capping strict_max_version), the eval/Function/code-string-timer file checks eval-call / function-constructor / string-timer (only scanned OUTSIDE the pure WebExtension tree - a WebExtension sandbox cannot run them without a permissive CSP, which csp-unsafe-* report; the eval() in background.js is therefore deliberately NOT flagged here, and those checks are covered by the eval-non-webext fixture), and the outbound-data checks cleartext-transmission / privacy-policy / native-messaging (covered by the outbound-data fixture). It declares no icons key, so addon-icon-missing fires here too. It declares strict_min_version 128.0, so messages.future (added in TB 200) trips strict-min-version-api. The ESLint code-sanity check is opt-in, so this fixture enables it via options.eslint to keep it covered.
